reviews.comment:
Muy caro y mala atención. No es para nada recomendable. Estuve en el carnaval. El Sábado 22/2, un empleado llamado José nos atendió de mala manera, innecesario.

(Translated by Google)
Very expensive and poor service. Not at all recommended. I was there during the carnival. On Saturday, February 22, an employee named José treated us rudely, unnecessarily.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Very clean and Wi-Fi is available, but it's not provided. It doesn't seem to work. There's also no way to charge devices. It's a shame about this lack of friendliness, especially considering how welcoming and open the place is otherwise.

(Original)
Sehr sauber und die Möglichkeit für Wifi. Wird aber nicht rausgegeben. Scheint nicht zu funktionieren. Ebenso keine Möglichkeit zum Laden von Geräten. Schade für diese Unfreundlichkeit im Gegensatz zu dem so freundlichen und offenen Ort.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNzVfR1pnEAE
